'''wayate''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adverbs|adverb]] meaning "[[Wikt:zingily|zingily]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| w-y-dh
|-
! Word class
| [[Adverb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:zingily|zingily]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| wayate
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].[[present]] || [[word:wayate|wayate]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]] || [[word:wayatesher|wayatesher]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:wayatesherĂ«m|wayatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:wayatero|wayatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:wayateshĂ«|wayateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:wayateshĂ«m|wayateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokiwayatero|gokiwayatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokiwayateshĂ«|gokiwayateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokiwayateshĂ«m|gokiwayateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gowayankerom|gowayankerom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gowayankeshĂ«|gowayankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gowayankeshĂ«m|gowayankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gowayankeya|gowayankeya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:wayaterom|wayaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:wayatemu|wayatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:wayateya|wayateya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokiwayaterom|gokiwayaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokiwayatemu|gokiwayatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokiwayateya|gokiwayateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[present]] || [[word:wayayate|wayayate]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:wayayatesher|wayayatesher]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:wayayatesherĂ«m|wayayatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:wayayatero|wayayatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:wayayateshĂ«|wayayateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:wayayateshĂ«m|wayayateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokiwayayatero|gokiwayayatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokiwayayateshĂ«|gokiwayayateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokiwayayateshĂ«m|gokiwayayateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gowayayankerom|gowayayankerom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gowayayankeshĂ«|gowayayankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gowayayankeshĂ«m|gowayayankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gowayayankeya|gowayayankeya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:wayayaterom|wayayaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:wayayatemu|wayayatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:wayayateya|wayayateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokiwayayaterom|gokiwayayaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokiwayayatemu|gokiwayayatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokiwayayateya|gokiwayayateya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[present]] || [[word:wĂŠyĂŠte|wĂŠyĂŠte]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:wĂŠyĂŠtesher|wĂŠyĂŠtesher]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:wĂŠyĂŠtesherĂ«m|wĂŠyĂŠtesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:wĂŠyĂŠtero|wĂŠyĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:wĂŠyĂŠteshĂ«|wĂŠyĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:wĂŠyĂŠteshĂ«m|wĂŠyĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokiwĂŠyĂŠtero|gokiwĂŠyĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokiwĂŠyĂŠteshĂ«|gokiwĂŠyĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokiwĂŠyĂŠteshĂ«m|gokiwĂŠyĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gowĂŠyĂŠnkerom|gowĂŠyĂŠnkerom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gowĂŠyĂŠnkeshĂ«|gowĂŠyĂŠnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gowĂŠyĂŠnkeshĂ«m|gowĂŠyĂŠnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gowĂŠyĂŠnkeya|gowĂŠyĂŠnkeya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:wĂŠyĂŠterom|wĂŠyĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:wĂŠyĂŠtemu|wĂŠyĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:wĂŠyĂŠteya|wĂŠyĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokiwĂŠyĂŠterom|gokiwĂŠyĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokiwĂŠyĂŠtemu|gokiwĂŠyĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokiwĂŠyĂŠteya|gokiwĂŠyĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[present]] || [[word:wafyafte|wafyafte]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:wafyaftesher|wafyaftesher]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:wafyaftesherĂ«m|wafyaftesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:wafyaftero|wafyaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:wafyafteshĂ«|wafyafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:wafyafteshĂ«m|wafyafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokiwafyaftero|gokiwafyaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokiwafyafteshĂ«|gokiwafyafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokiwafyafteshĂ«m|gokiwafyafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gowafyafnkerom|gowafyafnkerom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gowafyafnkeshĂ«|gowafyafnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gowafyafnkeshĂ«m|gowafyafnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gowafyafnkeya|gowafyafnkeya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:wafyafterom|wafyafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:wafyaftemu|wafyaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:wafyafteya|wafyafteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokiwafyafterom|gokiwafyafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokiwafyaftemu|gokiwafyaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokiwafyafteya|gokiwafyafteya]]
|}

''76 forms generated.''

== See also ==
